module.name: audit
module.spec: AuditLog records a single audit entry with timestamp, action (string), entity name (string), and details (string). The entry is appended to an in-memory log slice. The format is: "2006-01-02T15:04:05Z ACTION entity: details". No category or priority field is recorded.
AuditQuery searches the audit log for entries matching a given action string (exact match). Returns matching entries in chronological order (oldest first). An empty action returns all entries.
